assignments.name: client_usp
assignments.value: German PROBAT P60 automated roasting in Vietnam. 40-50 MT/month capacity. 30-40% lower landed costs vs European-roasted coffee. Direct access to Vietnamese origin coffee. Consistent batch quality through automated precision roasting.

assignments.name: client_proof_points
assignments.value: PROBAT P60 roasting system (used by leading European roasters). Current throughput 25 MT/month scaling to 50 MT. Based in Da Nang, Vietnam - direct origin access. Standardized roasting precision eliminates quality variance.

assignments.name: desired_tone
assignments.value: Warm, confident, and data-driven. Professional yet conversational. Clear focus on credibility and real numbers. Never overly salesy.

assignments.name: topics_to_avoid
assignments.value: Internal restructuring. Investor arrangements. Operational constraints. Guaranteed performance/ROI claims. Naming competitors. Unverified certifications.

assignments.name: default_cta
assignments.value: Would you be open to reviewing samples?
